title: It's Time...
overview: “It’s Time” was inspired by the story of Gail Lynn, a woman whose quest for healing led her to discover revolutionary sound and light therapies after conventional medicine failed to address her severe cardiovascular stress. Through her personal journey, Gail not only healed herself but also invented the Harmonic Egg® — a sound and light healing chamber that has transformed the lives of thousands. This groundbreaking technology, rooted in bio resonance and sacred geometry, is just one part of a larger story that explores the untapped potential of frequency healing.  The film follows Gail as she travels across America to meet leading experts from diverse fields, including cognitive neuroscience, medical law, agriculture, nutrition, metaphysics, and energy healing. Together, they unravel long-held beliefs that separate us from our innate power, inviting viewers to reconnect with the ancient wisdom of nature, consciousness, and the resilience of the human spirit.
